description_long: This is a single-story modern house set on a rectangular plot with a driveway leading up to the main entrance. The house features a flat roof and a mix of white and stone-textured exterior walls, giving it a contemporary appearance. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light inside. The property is surrounded by lush, mature trees and landscaped greenery, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The driveway and walkway are paved, and the front yard is open, while the backyard is more enclosed by trees. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white and stone-textured walls, large asymmetrical windows, and lush landscaping with mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and prominent trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stone-textured wall, flat roof, and a more open lawn area.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by dense trees, with glimpses of the back facade and windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage area, and additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved steps, and no porch, framed by landscaping and open to the driveway.
